compounds.frequency: 2x daily (morning on empty stomach and before bed)

benefits.description: Fragment 176-191 used for fat loss support
Ipamorelin or Sermorelin to support muscle gains with resistance training
Support for faster recovery from exercise-induced damage

protocol_notes: User recommends starting with these peptides only after establishing serious training habits and progressive overload. Daily protocol includes 10k steps, heavy lifting, 0.5x body weight in oz water, 200g protein daily. Fragment 176-191 taken on empty stomach first thing AM followed by 30g protein 30-60min later, then again before bed on empty stomach.
